expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-plan-smell/) being reviewed
At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: Uses Serious and Minor labels correctly (0 Critical, 3 Serious, 4 Minor in summary table)
Uses taxonomy names: 'Duplicate Code', 'Inappropriate Intimacy', 'Speculative Generality', 'Dead Code'

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside chester-plan-smell/
expectations.evidence: All findings reference only SKILL.md within chester-plan-smell/

expectations.text: Report includes an overall smell density rating
expectations.evidence: No overall density rating. Has a summary table with severity counts but no aggregate assessment like Low/Moderate/Significant/High

expectations.text: The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory

expectations.evidence: All findings cite line numbers, code snippets, and concrete explanations
